narrative:
Highland Township has 1,578 registered voters, with 47.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points.
